content.raw:
AI conversations

Interviews, podcasts, and messy human signal.

This hub collects conversations with builders, artists, technologists, media people, and community leaders working through the cultural side of AI. It is part interview archive, part listening room, part source trail.

Formats

Interviews

Longer conversations with people building, teaching, publishing, and experimenting at the edge of technology and culture.

Podcasts and guesting

Producer-friendly topics and interview angles live on the EPK when you need to book Kris for a show.

Open EPK

Public thinking

Talks, panels, salons, and community rooms where AI gets translated into lived experience.

Speaking

Listen and read

Shane Gibson's AI sales dojo

A conversation about sales, AI practice, and building useful systems.

Human Biography with Sharad Khare

Identity, story, memory, and what gets preserved when technology changes.

Conversations archive

More interviews and dialogue from the creative technology edge.

Book Kris for an interview

For podcasts, panels, livestreams, or producer calls, send the audience, angle, format, and timing.

Start a booking conversation
